title: Sweet Crumbly Indian Collard Crumble
description: This sweet and crumbly dish features tender collards topped with a warm, spiced mixture that's perfect for breakfast or as a side.

ingredients.name: 1 cup chopped fresh collard greens
ingredients.notes: Use the tougher stems for this recipe.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons ghee or oil
ingredients.notes: Canola or coconut would also work.

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground cardamom
ingredients.notes: Optional, to complement the sweetness and spices.

instructions: Heat ghee or oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add collard greens to the skillet and sauté until wilted, about 5 minutes.
Sprinkle with cinnamon, salt, sugar, and cardamom if using.
Stir gently to combine all ingredients, cooking for another minute or two until slightly thickened.
Serve warm as a side dish or drizzle over yogurt for breakfast.
